description_long: This object is a rectangular hardcover book with a dark, likely navy or black, cover and a contrasting light gray or silver section on the front. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with a visible spine and two circular elements on the back cover, possibly representing design motifs or functional features. The edges of the pages are visible and appear white, indicating standard paper material. The front cover features a large, light-colored area that may be a design or an attached element, but no detailed illustration is visible. The overall appearance is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a sturdy build.
description: A rectangular hardcover book with a dark cover, light gray accent, and minimalistic design. The book is medium-thick with visible white page edges and a sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: The book is seen from above, showing the dark cover with a prominent light gray section and a circular feature near the edge.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the side, highlighting the white page edges and the thickness of the book.
description_view_2: The back of the book is visible, displaying two circular motifs and the dark cover, with the light gray section partially visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the white page edges and the light gray section on the cover, with the book's thickness apparent.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark in color and appears plain, with no visible text or decorative elements.
